allow: Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3333/api/score -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"transcript":"Um, so basically, like, I think we should maybe consider, you know, rolling out the feature sometime next quarter, if that works for everyone. It depends on a lot of things.","promptText":"Recommend a rollout timeline for the new feature to the exec team","durationMs":18000,"words":[{"word":"Um","startMs":100,"endMs":400},{"word":"so","startMs":500,"endMs":700},{"word":"basically","startMs":750,"endMs":1300},{"word":"like","startMs":1400,"endMs":1600},{"word":"I","startMs":1700,"endMs":1800},{"word":"think","startMs":1850,"endMs":2100},{"word":"we","startMs":2150,"endMs":2300},{"word":"should","startMs":2350,"endMs":2600},{"word":"maybe","startMs":2650,"endMs":2950},{"word":"consider","startMs":3000,"endMs":3500},{"word":"you","startMs":3550,"endMs":3700},{"word":"know","startMs":3750,"endMs":3950},{"word":"rolling","startMs":4000,"endMs":4400},{"word":"out","startMs":4450,"endMs":4650},{"word":"the","startMs":4700,"endMs":4850},{"word":"feature","startMs":4900,"endMs":5400}]}')

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3333/api/talking-points -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"scenario":"Deliver tough feedback to a peer whose code quality has been slipping","vertical":"management","context":"Three missed code reviews last sprint, broken main branch twice, peer is a senior engineer who you respect","durationMs":60000}')
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3333/api/talking-points -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"context":"no scenario provided"}')

Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3333/api/score -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"transcript":"I recommend we phase the rollout over six weeks, starting with our three highest-engagement enterprise accounts. The reason is simple — these three accounts already run weekly check-ins with our team, so we get fast signal on any friction before it spreads. Week one: enable the feature for account A, capture their reactions in a shared doc. Week two through four: expand to accounts B and C, run a mid-point review, and adjust. Week five and six: open general availability with a pre-recorded walkthrough in the help center. If we see a twenty percent retention lift by week four, we greenlight the quarter-two marketing push. That gives us a clear gate, a clear timeline, and a clear fallback.","promptText":"Recommend a rollout timeline for the new feature to the exec team","durationMs":55000,"words":[{"word":"I","startMs":200,"endMs":300},{"word":"recommend","startMs":320,"endMs":820},{"word":"we","startMs":850,"endMs":980},{"word":"phase","startMs":1010,"endMs":1350},{"word":"the","startMs":1380,"endMs":1490},{"word":"rollout","startMs":1510,"endMs":1960},{"word":"over","startMs":1990,"endMs":2200},{"word":"six","startMs":2230,"endMs":2500},{"word":"weeks","startMs":2530,"endMs":2940}]}')
